# Cursor Changelog - Extracted Content

## Recent Updates (March 2026)

**Mar 19, 2026: Composer 2**
- Frontier-level coding model now available with strong results on challenging coding tasks
- Pricing: Standard at $0.50/M input, $2.50/M output tokens; Fast (default) at $1.50/M input, $7.50/M output

**Mar 11, 2026: New Marketplace Plugins**
- Over 30 new integrations added from partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale
- Plugins contain MCPs enabling cloud agents to read/write across user stacks

**Mar 5, 2026: Automations**
- Always-on agents triggered by schedules or events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, webhooks
- Agents access memory tools to learn from past runs and improve iteratively
- Cloud sandbox execution with configurable MCPs and models

**Mar 4, 2026: JetBrains IDE Support**
- Agent Client Protocol (ACP) integration for IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm
- Support for frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Cursor

**Mar 3, 2026: Version 2.6**
- MCP Apps: Interactive UIs in agent chats featuring charts (Amplitude), diagrams (Figma), whiteboards (tldraw)
- Team Marketplaces: Private plugin sharing with governance controls
- Debug mode improvements and 15 desktop enhancements
- 10 desktop bug fixes, 2 web improvements

## Navigation & Resources
Product areas: Agents, Code Review, Cloud, Tab, CLI, Marketplace
Company links: Enterprise, Pricing, Careers, Blog, Community, Students
